mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in the federal funds rate raises the risk-free discount rate, compressing the present value of future corporate earnings and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above -0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid acceleration in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending corporate revenue contraction, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in triggered periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When housing starts expand while industrial production remains flat or declines, it indicates a sectoral rotation toward interest-rate-sensitive demand that typically precedes broad equity outperformance over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in >50% of instances where HOUST rises and INDPRO falls concurrently.

mechanism_narrative: In a high-inflation environment, simultaneous increases in the federal funds rate and CPI compress real yields and equity risk premiums, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns in high-inflation/tightening periods do not statistically differ from low-inflation periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales and consumer spending directly boost near-term corporate revenue expectations, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 5 trading days as earnings revisions accelerate.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in >60% of instances where RSAFS rises month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained contraction in industrial production signals supply-side bottlenecks resolving into demand weakness or capacity oversupply, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in contraction periods are not significantly lower than expansion periods.

mechanism_narrative: When nonfarm payrolls grow while the unemployment rate simultaneously declines, it confirms a self-reinforcing labor market expansion that supports consumer spending and equity valuations over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in >55% of instances where PAYEMS rises and UNRATE falls concurrently.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of real GDP growth exceeding trend, an increase in the federal funds rate reflects accommodative policy chasing growth rather than fighting inflation, which historically supports positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC drops below 0.03 over a 3-year rolling window, or forward returns in high-GDP/tightening periods do not statistically differ from low-GDP periods.
